services.title: International Development Consulting
services.description: We provide comprehensive consulting services from planning to implementation of sustainable development projects in developing countries.
services.details: We support the entire project lifecycle including policy advice, project design, implementation support, and monitoring & evaluation.

services.title: Project Management
services.description: We support effective management of international cooperation projects to ensure project success.
services.details: We provide expertise in project management including budget management, progress tracking, risk management, and stakeholder coordination.

services.title: Capacity Development Support
services.description: We achieve sustainable development through capacity building of local staff and related organizations.
services.details: We provide comprehensive services related to human resource development including training program design & implementation, technology transfer, and organizational strengthening.
